{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004029706FC1C9EB2F56831401"}"},"total":2062},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7233462092039947048","common":{"comment_type":99,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写太好了，对情节的把控，关于美食的描写，让人看着就觉得馋虫被勾起来了，人物也有血有肉的，主角和罗蒙斗智斗勇，一步步成长为一个大厨。部分章节读起来除了顺畅和特别好玩以外，一些细节更是让人觉得温馨，虽然还没看完，但是不得不说这是一本好书，十分，很推荐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1684171910,"group_id":"7226638686492822583","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"君与君心皆留于盛夏，吾与吾爱皆亡于高塔。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxoM/9K8Sc4Q5PWSQYzWA4M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57a2eb4bdff34ba3af31a865e9f2df7e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793971&x-signature=DMtlb4Y0tjC4Q9c7nQh0cazUUNE%3D","user_id":"59193484662","user_name":"干饭人永不服输"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"59193484662","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7226638686492822583","book_info":{"abstract":"相亲失败，唐磊连夜跑路，不料竟绑定厨神系统，随机抽取经营点：战斗民族监狱食堂！
土豆炖肉，红烧肉，八宝鸭，糖醋排骨……
家常菜！国宴菜！珍馐美味，应有尽有！
给美食荒漠的西伯利亚来一点美食之国的震撼！
凶恶的囚犯刺头：“大哥还缺人洗碗吗？”
冷面无情的狱警：”兄弟给我留顿饭，我保你监狱横着走！”
神秘的监狱长：“扩建！五食堂必须扩建！监狱建设离不开你！”
更有金融大鳄，势力首领：“别捞了，不出去了，要坐牢到天荒地老！”
唐磊：……其实我只是想找份工作，然后老婆孩子热炕头。
战斗民族村花抱着饭碗不撒手：“走！跟我进屋！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7e10ad5b90eaa73420957e8f11706f27","author":"羽毛笔","author_id":"","book_id":"7226638686492822583","book_name":"美食：从承包毛熊监狱食堂开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7226689196184830522","read_count":"10184","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1306582"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"641","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c9178ff75e0632ed4a4182c712ed070a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381630&x-signature=McpClqU4z10%2FsVwBcVFIUfOGopU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"16739628691","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6237475e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004029706FC1C9EB2F56831401"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16237,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":38502},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_auth
